CTF FORENSIC

CHALLENGE NAME : Routine_Checks

--> WE HAVE 2 FILE 

+ * **Link file challenge:** [challenge.pcap.xz](./challenge.pcap.xz)
+ * * **Link file challenge:** [README.md](./README.md)

Description( HINT ) : 
Routine system checks were performed on the city’s communication network after reports of instability.

Operators sent brief messages between nodes to confirm everything was running smoothly.

Most of the exchanges are ordinary status updates, but one message stands out as… different.

Author : Gopi

- UNZIP challenge.pcap.xz THEN OPEN THIS FILE WITH WIRESHARK
- AT NO.14 THE LENGTH IS ABNORMAL , RIGHT CLICK AT THAT PACK --> SHOW -> TCP STREAM
- THE INFORMATION ARE CRAZY
- import os

-THEN WE SEE THIS IN RAW 
import os
print("")





THIS IS THE INFORMATION IN A PICTURE FILE .JPG , WE SAVE IT AS THE .JPG FILE THEN WE HAVE A PICTURE LIKE THIS 
![QR CODE](./Screenshot%202026-04-13%20211807.png)
SCAN THIS QR CODE WE HAVE FLAG 
flag {akjfj fabhfbshbhgahkjfhkhsdf hfhhskfhka.s.f.assafv}
